narrative: Iranian President Pezeshkian resigns as IRGC takes control, driving a geopolitical risk premium across the energy complex with WTI surging toward $90. USD/JPY firms to 159.47 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the dominant anchor despite the shock; gold lower -1.04%; equities +0.22%; DXY +0.15%; VIX 15.3. USD/CHF options market remains neutral at 0.7832 despite the 375bp carry advantage. Watch next BoC meeting on June 10.
